{{CargoRelic
|name=Taurus
|class_id=21633
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:
Gold! Gold! Gold! Gold!
Good or bad, a thousand fold!
|fame=65
|art=110
|fth=76
|civ=56
|tech=56
|ss1=All Minion ATK +10%<br>All Minion DEF +10%<br>In Museum Shop, available Wish Coins +1<br>In Museum Shop, Wish Coin Cost -10%
|ss2=All Minion ATK +10%<br>All Minion DEF +10%<br>In Museum Shop, available Wish Coins +1<br>In Museum Shop, Wish Coin Cost -10%
|ss3=All Minion ATK +10%<br>All Minion DEF +10%<br>In Museum Shop, available Wish Coins +1<br>In Museum Shop, Wish Coin Cost -10%
|ss4=All Minion ATK +10%<br>All Minion DEF +10%<br>In Museum Shop, available Wish Coins +1<br>In Museum Shop, Wish Coin Cost -10%
|ss5=All Minion ATK +10%<br>All Minion DEF +10%<br>In Museum Shop, available Wish Coins +1<br>In Museum Shop, Wish Coin Cost -10%
|ss6=All Minion ATK +10%<br>All Minion DEF +10%<br>In Museum Shop, available Wish Coins +1<br>In Museum Shop, Wish Coin Cost -10%
|ss7=All Minion ATK +10%<br>All Minion DEF +10%<br>In Museum Shop, available Wish Coins +1<br>In Museum Shop, Wish Coin Cost -10%<br>In Museum Shop, available Wish Coins +1 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Yamato skill III.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, B-tads gained +15%
|skill2=[[File:Yamato skill III.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, Cells collected +30%
|skill3=[[File:Yamato skill III.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, Travel SPD +9%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Taurus Star|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +15|orange}}
|3name=Kant|3rec=1.07M|3atk=22496|3defense=14815|3hp=191545|3weak=?
|4name=Freud|4rec=2.27M|4atk=35997|4defense=23707|4hp=416541|4weak=?
|5name=Tchaikovsky|5rec=4.49M|5atk=53303|5defense=35104|5hp=818106|5weak=?
|6name=Cromwell|6rec=8.34M|6atk=74880|6defense=49314|6hp=1470898|6weak=?
|Arec=14.60M|Aatk=101057|Adefense=66554|Ahp=2445444|Aweak=?
}}}}
